CC 2.1.209–214 adoption reconciliation

Five releases, 166 changelog bullets, 49 auto-filed cc-adoption issues — triaged in one bundled pass after the auto-triage pipeline degraded (extraction failed for 2.1.211, truncated 36/48 bullets for 2.1.212). Every bullet, filed or not, was ground-truth verified against the ork codebase. One real code adoption — and it was the one feature the filer never filed. latest_known advances 2.1.208 → 2.1.214; the support floor stays frozen at 2.1.206.

1
Real adoption (unfiled)
3
Confirmed → doc rows
8
Doc rows total
38
No-op false positives
52
Issues closed

Full evidence in docs/audits/cc-adoption-2.1.209-214-triage-2026-07-18.md. The one code change: sync-session-dispatcher.ts adds fork to the SessionStart light-mode gate (2.1.214 reports source: "fork"; forks previously arrived as "resume"). #2950 (filer truncation root cause) stays open.
